title: TillOn Method, Spel Class
description: Returns True if a stop has occurred from a till condition during the last Go/Jump/Move statement.
notes:
Use TillOn to check if the Till condition turned on during the last motion command using Till.

TillOn is equivalent to ((Stat(1) And 2) <> 0)
see_also:
Jump

Till

TillOn Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.TillOn() Then

  m_spel.Jump(2)

End If

C# Example:

if (m_spel.TillOn())

m_spel.Jump(2);
examples:
If m_spel.TillOn() Then m_spel.Jump(2)
End If
